item.title: a small collection
item.description:
1..... majidaliph on tt
2.....
3..... Floating in the Amazon source: a_cabanaoficial in amazonia on tt
4.....
5..... Snowfall in Sequoia National park, California
6.....
7.....
8.....
9..... Awesome News From California: The world’s LARGEST wildlife bridge is now fully funded and is being built near Los Angeles. It will save the southern mountain lion population from extinction & help heal the entire ecosystem https://imgur.com/gallery/RM7Kwan
10..... rightfootracing on tt
11..... This scientific documentary “What Plants Talk About” is mindblowing. They make choices, are sentient, & care for their babies. Someday soon human society will recognize the personhood of plants and give them civil rights. PBS Nature. Season 31. Episode. (2013) watch on youtube: https://youtu.be/WscJ0kcmigA?feature=shared If video doesn't work you can watch it here: https://kimcampion.com/?s=plant+intelligence
12..... user123481236 on tt
13..... Paige barrett on tt

item.title: Pregnant dog was dumped just outside of town. Luck Rescue rescued her and left her with a foster and she gave birth the same day!
item.description: Huge thanks to Audrey at Lucks Rescue, @rescue_with_me_, for rescuing Ginger and her pups!

item.title: REPORT: LegalEagle calls for members of D.C. Bar to vote again Pam Bondi's brother, Brad Bondi.
item.description: Source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d3lnnbmOCS8 Brad Bondi is running to be the next president of the D.C. Bar. Any D.C. lawyers can vote and should vote against Brad Bondi to help avoid even MORE abuse from the Orange regime. LegalEagle calls for members of D.C. Bar to vote AGAINST* Pam Bondi's brother, Brad Bondi.

item.title: What Happened Today #81
item.description: rump is done pretending that the courts matter. People fumed about his refusal to follow orders from the Supreme Court and a federal judge last week. Today, he attacked the justices because they won't rubber-stamp the parts of his deportation agenda that they say are illegal. He claims that trials aren't possible for migrants. Later in the day, the Justice Department gave Elon Musk's DOGE the entire immigration database including police reports, case histories, and court records. And they still call it law enforcement. Judges in Oregon and New York hit pause. The Wisconsin governor is demanding ICE comply with the law, but Washington is off the rails. This is not about border security. It's about executive power rejecting oversight from the judicial branch that is its equal. ? Call Congress. Demand oversight. Stay after this every day. Don’t trust the algorithm. Get this in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today P.S. Back later tonight, friends, after a crazy workday schedule. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-scotus 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-attacks-powell 3. https://go.govbrief.today/student-loan-collections 4. https://go.govbrief.today/dems-kilmar 5. https://go.govbrief.today/measles-montana 6. https://go.govbrief.today/ice-rikers 7. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-ecas 8. https://go.govbrief.today/osc-fired-workers 9. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-sues 10. https://go.govbrief.today/doge-interior 11. https://go.govbrief.today/bacon-fire-hegseth 12. https://go.govbrief.today/easter-egg-roll 13. https://go.govbrief.today/visas-oregon 14. https://go.govbrief.today/maduro-demands-release 15. https://go.govbrief.today/cuomo-comer 16. https://go.govbrief.today/congestion-pricing 17. https://go.govbrief.today/columbia-chain-gate 18. https://go.govbrief.today/wisconsin-ice-agents
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Shadow and Chance teach Sassy how to bark
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1338 (surf dracula)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Alternatively, Step 3 is "Write an absolute wall of text and never get a reply"
I'm surprised our current regime hasn't tried to kill off all the butterflies for creating hurricanes.
I type this while soaking in an early Epsom salt bubble bath, something that would often be seen by average society as feminine, but I would reply to them to suck me off.
I applied for what might be the local Holy Grail job. Turns out Superstition Meadery, on the other side of the mountain, is looking for a new meadmaker.
This is a small, strange ankylosaur that seemed to be adapted for swimming and eating water plants.
Pippin is a Dinosaur.
Previous interpretations of Helicopteron, the amazing worl-toothed ratfish-shark.
Anyway. I had to also create a cover letter for the application, and I fucking hate those... but I wasn't above cheekily mentioning I have won several awards for my homemade meads that were all original recipes and love to use then as a way to bring history to life and oh yeah, I can bring samples of my award-winning meads to my interview.
Hey look, a map of greater Phoenix.
Awwwww..
Assyrian charioteers vs. Cimmerian/Scythian cavalry.
Penguins are gonna win the trade war.
I kind of love this idea unironically.
Just in case.
I just thought of a strange idea for a boudoir photoshoot with a partner: posing them with molotov cocktails and machetes and the like.
It didn't work. Or did it? Did it postpone the evil into emerging in our time?
That's probably the last time there was only seven thousand people on earth.
Going with another comment to a meme above, I fucking love purple and I look *amazing* in Purple. I Need to get more purple shirts, but purple clothes for men are infuriatingly hard to find.
Let's hope the next revolution will be the last. It might not be, but so it goes.
Build nests for everyone.
Geologic map of the Payson ophiolite and environs along with a possible modern analog.
I would say.... no. Unless you are yourself a Dwarven character, eating dwarf flesh. Then you would be.
Dilophosaurus would actually have been more terrifying irl than in the Jurassic Park movies, I think.
These clouds! These Sauropods!
The irony amuses me greatly. Birds are theropod dinosaurs, which were in the Lizard-hipped (Saurichian) group.
It's good.
So, remember that AI interview? Apparently, that company specifically works with building AI. The position I applied for was as a contractor position for identifying birds to aid in a...something something algorithm something, I guess? Very much a temporary independent contractor job. And I got it, though the project isn't going to begin for a few weeks yet, and it will only be for a short term. But it's something. I can't say much more (holy shit only the second time I've ever had to sign a NDA) but... to oversimplify for sardonic humor value, I'll be teaching Tech Bro Calvinist Singularity Jesus how to properly identify birds. This amuses me greatly.
When I was younger and more full of myself, I sometimes wondered if I was a Bodhisattva that forgot they were one.
This has actually been the advantage of having an entirely new phone and having to save and create entirely new Playlists. I'll hear a song I've not heard in years for some reason and be all "aw shit that's a banger" Incidentally, it's also re-awakened a love for the music of The Mountain Goats.
My conspiracy theory right now is that RFK et al. have noticed we're all fighting back against their whole anti-trans thing and are thinking that by switching to attacking autism, it'll be something that everyone is really against, surely he can clear the autistic folk out, right? Nobody's gonna fight them on that, right? I think us autistic folks are gonna be the next target for hate, coming out of warped sympathy. And it makes me glad in a way that I was advised not to get a proper diagnosis--it means I won't get rounded up. No, I'm not paranoid, not at *all*
Reference to Stag's Leap, and the 1970s wine contest that saw California wines rise to the critical hights of European wines.
This is sadly true.
Nom.
I got the first proofs back for the second sticker design, and let me say, I am in love with it. I hope y'all like whiptail lizards...
The band is Heilung.
Blackreach is fucking gorgeous. I'd not live there, but I'd definitely camp there, I think.
Sure, that might be obvious enough for me to catch on.
And also hoping you don't lose the thought entirely.
I'd say this is accurate
Kapow.
Does anyone know specifically what Pope Francis said to the Couchfucker? Or was this short meeting in silence? Without any data, in my head, it's like the meeting between Pope Leo and Attila the Hun, where Leo said... something that made Attila turn back from the gates of Rome. We don't know what it was. But I think to think Francis would have said something to him, admonished him for his evil. But I digress.
Yeah they didn't actually make a dire wolf.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "hey there Pippin. Son of a chicken! Beep. Beep!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: spring is here!! [OC]
item.description:
I needed spring much more than I thought, all that wintery grey was starting to get to me :,D
Today I present to you, Ms. Bean as cat tax! If you want to support my illustrations do check out my Patreon! https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives
